rationale: A cover is a subcollection C (def:subset) of the power set P(A) (def:power-set) whose union equals A (def:union). All three were missing from the empty set.
notes: Under-specified []. DUPLICATE FLAG: this node (def:set-cover, title 'Cover', condition union C = A) duplicates def:cover-full (0019, title 'Cover', condition A subset of union C). Two 'Cover' definitions differing only by = vs subset (equivalent when C subset of P(A)). Strong dedup candidate -- recommend the reviewer merge.
